_inspectorSnowReport.Report:
Saturday March 14 | 5:49 a.m 

Bonjour Tremblant,

Winter has made its return, and it's showing up in style! With 15 cm of fresh snow over the past 72 hours, the slopes are enjoying a great refresh just in time for the weekend. Additionally, with another 5 cm expected throughout the day, the fun is far from over! Temperatures are sitting at a cool -4°C, and while moderate winds will be present throughout the day, they're expected to remain steady and consistent. The sun has also been gracing us with more and more daylight, and to make the most of those extra golden hours, our Soleil, Duncan, and Télécabine lifts will be running until 4:30 p.m. today, so no rush to call it early!

Moreover, following a week of variable conditions on the mountain, please note that glade trails and touring trails remain closed for the time being. We appreciate your understanding as our crews work to get them back in top shape. Finally, freestyle riders, whether you're just finding your footing or going all out, our 4 Terrain Parks are ready for you! .

And the weekend is only getting better: Ontario March Break festivities kick off tonight on Place St-Bernard! Come celebrate the start of the break with us, we can't wait to see you there!

First Tracks
  • Access to designated lifts, on both North and South side, as early as 7:45 a.m.
  • Ski on designated North Side slopes at 8 a.m.
Have a great one out there, enjoy every turn!

Mountain safety tip of the week: Remove your backpack.
In chairlifts, to ensure you are seated properly, remove your backpack and place it on your lap or, if space allows, on the seat. This reduces the risk of accidents or of straps getting caught in the lift.

Snow fall is recorded daily at 5 a.m from mid-mountain at North Side (550 m / 1,800 ft). This data, based on 24 hours, provides a picture of on-mountain conditions. Actual accumulation may differ from the official report. Be aware of changing conditions. Lifts and trails exist in a mountain environment and may close due to weather, usage and/or special maintenance.
_inspectorSnowReport.Alert:
Due to recent weather conditions, several locations on the mountain have icy surfaces.

To fully enjoy your experience safely, we invite you to stay on groomed runs and avoid ungroomed areas.
_inspectorSnowReport.SafetyReport: Happy Saturday! Winter is back with 15 cm of fresh snow over the past 72 hours and 5 cm more expected today! Temperatures around -4°C with moderate but steady winds. Soleil, Duncan, and Télécabine lifts open until 4:30 p.m. Glade and touring trails remain closed following variable conditions. 4 Terrain Parks open for all levels. Ontario March Break animations begin tonight on Place St-Bernard.
_inspectorSnowReport.SafetyReportFrench: Bon samedi! L'hiver est de retour avec 15 cm de neige fraîche au cours des 72 dernières heures et 5 cm supplémentaires attendus aujourd'hui! Températures autour de -4°C avec des vents modérés et constants. Les remontées Soleil, Duncan et Télécabine sont ouvertes jusqu'à 16h30. Les sentiers en sous-bois et de randonnée demeurent fermés suite aux conditions variables. Les animations de la relâche ontarienne débutent ce soir sur la Place St-Bernard.
